creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
I adjusted the patch a bit to adapt it to llvm32 and clang32 (the
versionless ones were removed) however it fails to build, the log is at

http://people.freebsd.org/~rene/clay-0.1.2_1.log

New patch at http://people.freebsd.org/~rene/patches/lang__clay.diff

Can you investigate?
